title: schimpera arabica subsp. persica
intro: Schimpera arabica subsp. persica, also known as Persian orange, is a subspecies of Schimpera arabica, a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schimpera arabica subsp. persica include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant's leaves and fruits can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in traditional medicine.
